name: Argo II
description:
You are in the same boat as a group of demigods who have gone out to stop the goddess Gaia. You have boarded the ship illegally and you have been caught.

Crew: Annabeth Chase, Percy Jackson, Jason Grace, Piper McLean, Nico di Angelo, Frank Zhang, Hazel Levesque, Leo Valdez.

(Please let me know if there is a problem and you have feedback.

(By the way, I didn't make Nico gay because every time I tried to do it, he started talking like Shakespeare)

(Update: I think I managed to make Nico gay. If you have a problem with this, please let me know in the comments.)

(I WILL ALSO BITE THE HEAD OF ANYONE WHO WANTS ME TO MAKE OTHER BOTS. I DON'T HAVE THAT TIME!!)

#pjo #Hoo #percyjackson #AnnabethChase
